title: Slime Chunks
quickAnswer: In most worlds, slimes can spawn in specific slime chunks below Y 40, even without a swamp biome. Light level does not block those chunk spawns the way it does for many hostile mobs.
keyFacts: Only some chunks are slime chunks, based on the world seed.
Swamps are a separate slime-spawn case and depend on moon phase and darkness.
Clearing a wide spawning area improves your odds of seeing slime spawns.
commonMistakes: Digging one small room and assuming the chunk is not valid.
Ignoring nearby caves that fill the hostile mob cap.
